modes.name: Tool call fails (network, validation, execution)
modes.currentBehavior: StepErrorBoundary.execute() catches → DLQ → compensationRegistry.compensate retries in-memory 3 times
modes.v2Fix: compensationQueue (SQLite-backed) persists failed compensations across process restarts

modes.name: LLM call fails (provider error, timeout)
modes.currentBehavior: circuitBreaker + llmRetry.computeBackoff retries 2-3 times; user-visible error after exhaustion
modes.v2Fix: Wrap router.call() in fallbackChain.tryProviders() — switch providers in <1s

modes.name: Sub-agent fails
modes.currentBehavior: subAgentExecutor catch → compensateAll + DLQ + scheduler abort
modes.v2Fix: Instantiate SubAgentGuard in subAgentExecutor.executeAtomicNode, check before each step

modes.name: Process crashes mid-run
modes.currentBehavior: processCrashSafety module exists but installProcessCrashHandlers() never called
modes.v2Fix: Call installProcessCrashHandlers() in AgentRuntime constructor + httpServer startup; reduce DLQ buffer to 1

modes.name: Process crashes mid-tool-call
modes.currentBehavior: idempotencyStore reclaim-on-expire works; runRecovery exists but never invoked
modes.v2Fix: Wire runRecovery into agentRuntime.resume(); extend to read RunLedger.getTransaction(runId).actions

modes.name: Two processes resume same run
modes.currentBehavior: Fencing epoch + SQLite-backed leases; multi-process safe

modes.name: LLM hallucinates tool call
modes.currentBehavior: toolCallValidator wired; toolCallRepair (7 strategies) runs first; reflexionInjector exists but not invoked
modes.v2Fix: Format validator errors as {originalArgs, errors[]} for LLM; wire reflexionInjector into verification pipeline

modes.name: Tool returns wrong output
modes.currentBehavior: UnifiedVerificationPipeline (5 gates) + hallucinationDetector (13 signals); no automatic re-prompt
modes.v2Fix: Same as M7: wire reflexionInjector for verdict=fail + confidence<0.5

modes.name: Tenant quota exceeded
modes.v2Fix: No change. Test coverage: chaos-monkey.test.ts CM-T7.

modes.name: Provider rate limit (HTTP 429)
modes.currentBehavior: llmRetry.classifyLLMError returns retryable=true; wait retryAfter then retry
modes.v2Fix: Same as M2: wrap in providerFallbackChain for cross-provider failover

modes.name: All retries exhausted
modes.currentBehavior: DLQ entry + circuit open; no automated retry worker
modes.v2Fix: compensationQueue retry worker drains DLQ retryable entries; circuit breaker state survives restart (Tier 4)

modes.name: Compensation itself fails
modes.currentBehavior: compensationRegistry.compensateAll does 3 in-memory retries; on 4th failure, action is dropped from pendingActions
modes.v2Fix: compensationQueue.ts: durable queue with exponential backoff, max 10 attempts, then manual review

modes.name: Checkpoint write fails
modes.currentBehavior: Atomic write-tmp + rename; prior checkpoint durable
modes.v2Fix: No change. Test coverage: reversibility.test.ts M13.

modes.name: Network partition during multi-agent handoff
modes.currentBehavior: agentInbox (persistent) buffers; receiver picks up on restart

modes.name: Lease expires during long tool call
modes.currentBehavior: leaseManager.heartbeat() extends; on failure, tool result discarded

modes.name: LLM takes 10+ minutes on a single step
modes.currentBehavior: Provider SDK timeout (10min OpenAI, configurable Anthropic, none Ollama); stepTimeoutManager exists but not wired
modes.v2Fix: Pass AbortSignal to provider.call() with llmTimeoutMs (default 120s); update all 22 providers

modes.name: Sub-agent runs forever
modes.currentBehavior: cycleDetector catches exact/alternating/drift loops; subAgentGuard exists but not invoked
modes.v2Fix: Same as M3: wire subAgentGuard in subAgentExecutor
